The '''Qeimet fleet''' was a unit of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
The Qeimet fleet shared its name with the [[Qeimet system/Legends|Qeimet system]] of the [[Juris sector/Legends|Juris sector]]. It was stationed near the [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula]], a strategic [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] where the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] had a strong presence. The [[Fleet/Legends|fleet's]] primary objective was to quell the rebellious [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] in the [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] and bring them under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control.

The fleet's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] was the [[Victorious (capital ship)|''Victorious'']], but it was perhaps most famous as the command in which the [[Scimitar assault wing]] acquired its reputation, aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Retribution (Imperial-class)|''Retribution'']]. The Scimitar assault wing was the spearhead of many of the Qeimet fleet's most notable engagements in the [[Hook Nebula campaign]], such as the [[siege of Nulan VI]], the [[assault of the Aturi Cluster]] and the [[assault of U'Dray]].
